description: Add parameters and their values to a FCS data file
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## AddFCSParameter GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
AddFCSParameter is a GenePattern module that Add parameters and their values to a FCS data file

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: Input.fcs.data.file, Input.csv.file, Output.file.name
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>addfcsparameter.jar <Input.fcs.data.file> <Input.csv.file> <Output.file.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.fcs.data.file
parameters.description: A FCS data file to add parameters to.

parameters.name: Input.csv.file
parameters.description: A CSV file with parameters and values to add.
